system.description:
The skill to handle ruling a kingdom or city state, bureaucracies, and the law.
  • Understanding the local laws to avoid legal entanglements: Govern/EDU 8+
  • Reading a merchant's ledgers to learn about a business venture: Govern/EDU 8+
  • Knowing who to bribe to get things done at the palace: Govern/SOC 8+
system.shortdescr: Ruling kingdoms, bureaucracies, and handling the law.
